title: Quest 35530 0.8L Rice Cooker/Up to 4 Servings/Non-Stick Removable Bowl/Keep Warm Functionality/Includes Measuring Cup & Spatula/Cook White or Brown Rice, Porridge and more
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 0.8L RICE COOKER – This fantastic rice cooker has a 0.8 litre capacity, and is ideal for couples, individuals or small families looking to make the most perfect flavoursome rice quickly and easily.

REMOVABLE NON-STICK BOWL - The non-stick bowl is removable so you can easily transfer it to your dining room table. The transparent lid allows you to check on the progress of the rice during cooking. The rice cooker also comes with a measuring cup to ensure you always get your portions right & a spatula for serving.

KEEP WARM FUNCTION – This traditional rice cooker features an automatic keep warm function, and the 2 LED lights on the front of the machine will indicate when the rice is either being cooked or being kept warm.

NOT JUST RICE! – The beauty of this product is that it is multi-functional. This rice cooker allows you to cook chilli's, stews, casseroles, risottos too, giving you the ultimate flexibility come dinner time.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Non-Stick Bowl Freshly cooked rice will always be easy to serve, as the inner bowl has a non-stick coating. Transparent Lid Check the progress of your cooking through the transparent lid, which also features a steam vent. Easy Controls Choose between the cooking and keep warm function, and the rice cooker will sort the rest. Spatula Included The rice cooker comes with a plastic spatula, making both cooking & serving convenient. Measuring Cup Cook the exact portion of rice that you desire, thanks to the included transparent measuring cup. Next page 1 Non-Stick Bowl 2 Transparent Lid 3 Easy Controls 4 Spatula Included 5 Measuring Cup
